mod-colorwheel-width.description:
Used by `--spectrum-colorwheel-width`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-wheel-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorwheel-height.description:
Used by `--spectrum-colorwheel-height`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-wheel-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorwheel-fill-color-disabled.description:
Used by `--spectrum-colorwheel-fill-color-disabled`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-disabled-background-color)`, if not set.

mod-colorwheel-border-width.description:
Used by `--spectrum-colorwheel-border-width`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-border-width-100)`, if not set.

mod-colorwheel-track-width.description:
Used by `--spectrum-colorwheel-track-width`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-control-track-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorwheel-min-width.description:
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-wheel-minimum-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorwheel-colorarea-container-size.description:
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel-inner`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-colorwheel-colorarea-container-size)`, if not set.

mod-colorwheel-colorarea-margin.description:
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel-colorarea-container`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-wheel-color-area-margin)`, if not set.

mod-colorwheel-border-color.description:
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel-border`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-colorwheel-border-color)`, if not set.

mod-colorwheel-path-borders.description:
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel-border`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-colorwheel-path-borders)`, if not set.

mod-colorwheel-path.description:
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel-wheel`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-colorwheel-path)`, if not set.

spectrum-colorwheel-width.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ColorWheel`.
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel`, `.spectrum-ColorWheel-handle`, `.spectrum-ColorWheel-border`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-colorwheel-width, var(--spectrum-color-wheel-width))`, if not set.

spectrum-colorwheel-height.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ColorWheel`.
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel`, `.spectrum-ColorWheel-border`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-colorwheel-height, var(--spectrum-color-wheel-width))`, if not set.

spectrum-colorwheel-fill-color-disabled.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ColorWheel`.
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel-border.is-disabled`, `.spectrum-ColorWheel-wheel.is-disabled`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-colorwheel-fill-color-disabled, var(--spectrum-disabled-background-color))`, if not set.

spectrum-colorwheel-border-width.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ColorWheel`.
Used by `--_border-width`, `.spectrum-ColorWheel-wheel`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-colorwheel-border-width, var(--spectrum-border-width-100))`, if not set.

spectrum-colorwheel-track-width.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ColorWheel`.
Used by `--_track-width`, `.spectrum-ColorWheel-handle`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-colorwheel-track-width, var(--spectrum-color-control-track-width))`, if not set.

spectrum-colorwheel-border-color.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ColorWheel`.
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel-border`.
Defaults to `var(--system-color-wheel-border-color)`, if not set.

system-color-wheel-border-color.description:
Defined in `.spectrum`.
Used by `--spectrum-colorwheel-border-color`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-transparent-black-300)`, if not set.

highcontrast-colorwheel-border-color-dis.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ColorWheel`.
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel-border.is-disabled`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-colorwheel-fill-color-disabled)`, if not set.

highcontrast-colorwheel-fill-color-disab.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ColorWheel`.
Used by `.spectrum-ColorWheel-wheel.is-disabled`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-colorwheel-fill-color-disabled)`, if not set.
